How It Works

Simple Process. Fast Results.

01

Call or Text

Reach out at 704-237-0164. Same-day response guaranteed.

02

Free On-Site Quote

We come to you, assess the job, confirm price before starting.

03

We Get to Work

You approve, we start immediately. Professional and thorough.

04

Done Right

Job complete, you’re satisfied — or we make it right.

Where We Work

Serving the Charlotte Metro

Based in Steele Creek, covering all of greater Charlotte and surrounding communities.

Who We Are

Charlotte Built.
Charlotte Proud.

Mount N Muscle was built on one idea — Charlotte deserves a service provider who actually shows up, does the work right, and treats your home like their own.

Charlotte-based crew, Steele Creek area. No corporate middlemen — the same experienced hands on every job from first call to final haul.

Our Commitment

The Mount N Muscle Promise

Same-Day Response

When you reach out, you hear back the same day. Direct line to the person doing the job.

On-Site Pricing

We assess in person before quoting. What you see is what you pay — no surprises.

No Hidden Fees

The price we agree on is the final price. Honest every time.

We Show Up

If we book a time, we are there. Your schedule matters.

10% Review Discount

Leave a Google review after your job and get 10% off your next service.

Local Owner-Operated

You are hiring a Charlotte local who cares about every job like it’s their own home.

Spread the Word

The Neighbor Program

No points systems, no app — just genuine thank-yous for people who trust us enough to share us.

🎂

First Referral — Sweet Thank You

Cake or dessert from a local Charlotte bakery, delivered with a handwritten note.

⭐

Three Referrals — Founding Client

Priority scheduling, rate lock guarantee, and surprise gifts throughout the year.

👑

Five+ Referrals — Community Partner

Exclusive perks, first access to open slots, long-term relationship we take seriously.

How It Works
1

Refer someone who needs any of our services.

2

They mention your name when booking.

3

Job completes and they love the work.

4

We show up at your door with a thank you worth remembering.

Got Questions

Frequently Asked

Single-item pickups start at $90. Most single-room cleanouts run $125–$200. Pricing confirmed on-site before we begin. Call 704-237-0164.

Yes — same-day service is often available across the Charlotte metro. Call or text 704-237-0164 to check availability.

Yes — we cover 16 cities including Fort Mill, Rock Hill, Huntersville, Concord, Mooresville, Matthews, Pineville, Ballantyne, Mount Holly, Gastonia, Waxhaw, Stallings, Indian Trail, Tega Cay, and Lake Wylie.

Always free. We come out, assess the job, give you a clear price, and only start when you approve. No pressure, no obligation.

Yes — one of our most common jobs. We handle cable concealment through the wall. Above-fireplace installations run $175–$250.

Refer someone who books a job and have them mention your name. Once their job is complete, we deliver a real thank-you to your door.

Furniture assembly, ceiling fan installation, shelving, drywall repair, door repairs, shed assembly, fixture installation and general home maintenance throughout Charlotte.
